statement: Lambda GPU Cloud lists NVIDIA B200 SXM6 (8x) on-demand at $6.69 per GPU-hour.
why: Static listed rental price level with no stated baseline or change; captured for the day-over-day price overlay series.

impact.mechanism: Display-overlay rental price level for Nvidia B200 capacity; informs pricing context but does not score.

confidence.basis: Vendor's own on-demand pricing page; no as-of date shown.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 2.79 -> 6.69 (tol 1%); sources: Lambda
